purpose: Blocking name gate on the group-invite join card for nameless users (epic-group-invite-link-onboarding, story S1). Renders a name input and keeps the Request-to-Join button disabled until the current user has a shareable nickname, then persists the entered name exclusively through the existing saveProfile chokepoint.

public_api.name: JoinRequestCard
public_api.signature: export default function JoinRequestCard(props: { nonce: string; adminNpub: string; groupName: string }): JSX.Element
public_api.description: Unchanged public signature (rendered by pages/groups.tsx). Internal behavior gains the S1 name gate; named users see today's render unchanged (AC-GATE-4).

public_api.name: isNameGateActive
public_api.description: Pure predicate: true iff the current saved profile nickname is not shareable (wraps hasShareableName). Single source of truth for whether the name gate renders at all (AC-GATE-1, AC-GATE-4). Exported for unit testing given this repo has no component-render/snapshot capability.

public_api.name: isJoinRequestDisabled
public_api.signature: export function isJoinRequestDisabled(gateActive: boolean, draftName: string): boolean
public_api.description: Pure predicate: true iff the Request-to-Join button must stay disabled -- the gate is active AND the live draft name typed into the input does not yet satisfy hasShareableName (AC-GATE-3, reactive per keystroke). Exported for unit testing; this is the exact function the component calls for its `isDisabled` prop, not a re-derivation.

dependencies_allowed: app/src/context/ProfileContext.tsx#useProfile (reads profile.nickname, calls saveProfile) -- pre-existing permitted export per architecture.md Boundary rules
app/src/lib/shareCard.ts#hasShareableName -- pre-existing permitted export per architecture.md Boundary rules
app/src/lib/marmot/joinRequestSender.ts#sendJoinRequest -- already imported pre-epic, unchanged call site
dependencies_forbidden: any kind-0 / public-profile publish path (privacy invariant)
